# doplane

> Kubernetes operator that runs Pulumi under the hood: any provider or component from the Pulumi ecosystem becomes a Kubernetes-native API, with external-resource state stored in the object status.

Use the pages below as task context. Preserve the invariants and verify the success conditions stated on each page.

## Documentation

- [Getting started](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/guide/getting-started)
- [Discover providers and components](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/guide/discover)
- [Choose an API](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/guide/choose-an-api)
- [Build from source](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/guide/build-from-source)
- [Control loop and state](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/concepts/control-loop)
- [Dependencies and composites](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/concepts/dependencies)
- [Day-2 operations](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/operations/day-2)
- [Security and tenancy](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/operations/security)
- [Repository context for agents](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/reference/agent-context)
- [Conditions and failures](https://dirien.github.io/doplane/reference/conditions)

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/dirien/doplane)
- [Agent instructions](https://github.com/dirien/doplane/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Examples](https://github.com/dirien/doplane/tree/main/examples)
